forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,47 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KQ367XFMW2CP7GWM4GJ41BNR
+- 01KQ368MJDZNHXZ5HM9QQ0JGBK
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: f980
+project: acp-upgrade
+title: Adapt llama-agent to ACP 0.11
+---
+## What
+
+Update `llama-agent/` to compile and pass tests against ACP 0.11.1.
+
+Primary files:
+- `llama-agent/src/acp/server.rs` — top-level `AcpServer`; verify `Agent` trait impl matches 0.11 signatures.
+- `llama-agent/src/acp/session.rs` — session state.
+- `llama-agent/src/acp/translation.rs` — heavy use of `ContentBlock`, `SessionId`, `SessionUpdate`, `ToolCall`, `ToolCallId`, `ToolKind`, `SessionNotification`, `ContentChunk` (1+ extensive `match` blocks; non_exhaustive variants are the main risk).
+- `llama-agent/src/acp/mcp_client_factory.rs` — `McpServer` config type.
+- `llama-agent/src/acp/permissions.rs`, `commands.rs`, `terminal.rs`, `filesystem.rs`, `plan.rs`, `error.rs`, `config.rs`, `mod.rs`.
+- `llama-agent/src/mcp_client_handler.rs`, `mcp.rs`.
+- `llama-agent/src/agent.rs` — agent server.
+- `llama-agent/src/examples/acp_stdio.rs` — stdio entrypoint example.
+- `llama-agent/tests/acp_integration.rs`, `llama-agent/tests/integration/acp_*.rs` — integration tests.
+
+Specific things to handle:
+1. `Agent` trait method signatures match 0.11; new required methods (if any) get implementations consistent with the existing AcpServer pattern.
+2. `match` arms in `translation.rs` over `SessionUpdate`, `ContentBlock`, `ContentChunk`, `ToolKind`, `ToolCallStatus` — add explicit handling for any new non_exhaustive variants.
+3. Error conversion in `error.rs` and `translation.rs::ToJsonRpcError` — adjust if `Error` constructors changed.
+4. `acp/config.rs` — verify any `ConfigOption` / capability types still match.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `cargo check -p llama-agent --all-targets` passes.
+- [ ] `cargo clippy -p llama-agent --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes.
+- [ ] All `Agent` trait methods implemented; no missing-method errors.
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p llama-agent` — all pass.
+- [ ] `llama-agent/tests/acp_integration.rs` and `tests/integration/acp_*.rs` — green.
+
+## Workflow
+- Strict adaptation task — restore green, no feature additions.
+
+## Depends on
+- 01KQ367XFMW2CP7GWM4GJ41BNR (version bump).
+- 01KQ368MJDZNHXZ5HM9QQ0JGBK (extras crate adapted — llama-agent depends on it).
\ No newline at end of file

changes.value:
## What

Update `llama-agent/` to compile and pass tests against ACP 0.11.1.

Primary files:
- `llama-agent/src/acp/server.rs` — top-level `AcpServer`; verify `Agent` trait impl matches 0.11 signatures.
- `llama-agent/src/acp/session.rs` — session state.
- `llama-agent/src/acp/translation.rs` — heavy use of `ContentBlock`, `SessionId`, `SessionUpdate`, `ToolCall`, `ToolCallId`, `ToolKind`, `SessionNotification`, `ContentChunk` (1+ extensive `match` blocks; non_exhaustive variants are the main risk).
- `llama-agent/src/acp/mcp_client_factory.rs` — `McpServer` config type.
- `llama-agent/src/acp/permissions.rs`, `commands.rs`, `terminal.rs`, `filesystem.rs`, `plan.rs`, `error.rs`, `config.rs`, `mod.rs`.
- `llama-agent/src/mcp_client_handler.rs`, `mcp.rs`.
- `llama-agent/src/agent.rs` — agent server.
- `llama-agent/src/examples/acp_stdio.rs` — stdio entrypoint example.
- `llama-agent/tests/acp_integration.rs`, `llama-agent/tests/integration/acp_*.rs` — integration tests.

Specific things to handle:
1. `Agent` trait method signatures match 0.11; new required methods (if any) get implementations consistent with the existing AcpServer pattern.
2. `match` arms in `translation.rs` over `SessionUpdate`, `ContentBlock`, `ContentChunk`, `ToolKind`, `ToolCallStatus` — add explicit handling for any new non_exhaustive variants.
3. Error conversion in `error.rs` and `translation.rs::ToJsonRpcError` — adjust if `Error` constructors changed.
4. `acp/config.rs` — verify any `ConfigOption` / capability types still match.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `cargo check -p llama-agent --all-targets` passes.
- [ ] `cargo clippy -p llama-agent --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes.
- [ ] All `Agent` trait methods implemented; no missing-method errors.

## Tests
- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p llama-agent` — all pass.
- [ ] `llama-agent/tests/acp_integration.rs` and `tests/integration/acp_*.rs` — green.

## Workflow
- Strict adaptation task — restore green, no feature additions.

## Depends on
- 01KQ367XFMW2CP7GWM4GJ41BNR (version bump).
- 01KQ368MJDZNHXZ5HM9QQ0JGBK (extras crate adapted — llama-agent depends on it).

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -11,29 +11,37 @@
 ---
 ## What

-Update `llama-agent/` to compile and pass tests against ACP 0.11.1.
+**REWRITE** `llama-agent/` against the new ACP 0.11.1 SDK design. The old `impl Agent` pattern is gone (see spike findings on task 01KQ367HE0Z8ZSXY90CTT8QYGG and migration guide https://agentclientprotocol.github.io/rust-sdk/migration_v0.11.x.html).

-Primary files:
-- `llama-agent/src/acp/server.rs` — top-level `AcpServer`; verify `Agent` trait impl matches 0.11 signatures.
-- `llama-agent/src/acp/session.rs` — session state.
-- `llama-agent/src/acp/translation.rs` — heavy use of `ContentBlock`, `SessionId`, `SessionUpdate`, `ToolCall`, `ToolCallId`, `ToolKind`, `SessionNotification`, `ContentChunk` (1+ extensive `match` blocks; non_exhaustive variants are the main risk).
-- `llama-agent/src/acp/mcp_client_factory.rs` — `McpServer` config type.
-- `llama-agent/src/acp/permissions.rs`, `commands.rs`, `terminal.rs`, `filesystem.rs`, `plan.rs`, `error.rs`, `config.rs`, `mod.rs`.
-- `llama-agent/src/mcp_client_handler.rs`, `mcp.rs`.
-- `llama-agent/src/agent.rs` — agent server.
-- `llama-agent/src/examples/acp_stdio.rs` — stdio entrypoint example.
-- `llama-agent/tests/acp_integration.rs`, `llama-agent/tests/integration/acp_*.rs` — integration tests.
+504 lines reference `agent_client_protocol`. Largest single hot-spot is `acp/server.rs` (the `AcpServer` `impl Agent`) and `acp/translation.rs` (heavy `match` over schema enums).
+
+## Spike-confirmed scope
+
+### The full Agent impl is gone
+- `llama-agent/src/acp/server.rs` defines `AcpServer` with the old 9-method `impl Agent`. **Rewrite as a builder graph.**
+- Supporting modules (`acp/session.rs`, `acp/translation.rs`, `acp/mcp_client_factory.rs`, `acp/permissions.rs`, `acp/commands.rs`, `acp/terminal.rs`, `acp/filesystem.rs`, `acp/plan.rs`, `acp/error.rs`, `acp/config.rs`, `acp/mod.rs`) all need import-path migration to `agent_client_protocol::schema::*` plus call-site adjustments where they construct/consume the old types.
+- `llama-agent/src/mcp_client_handler.rs`, `llama-agent/src/mcp.rs` — same.
+- `llama-agent/src/agent.rs` (top-level agent server) — same.
+- `llama-agent/src/examples/acp_stdio.rs` — rewrite the stdio entrypoint to use the new `Agent.builder().connect_to(...)` pattern; the existing stdio harness is an `impl Agent` driver.
+
+### Match-arm rewrites
+- `acp/translation.rs` has heavy `match` over `SessionUpdate`, `ContentBlock`, `ContentChunk`, `ToolKind`, `ToolCallStatus`, `StopReason`. Each block needs:
+  - Import-path migration to `schema::`
+  - Continued explicit handling of `#[non_exhaustive]` variants
+  - Possibly a structural rewrite if the new typed message dispatch (`MatchDispatchFrom`, `if_request_from`, `if_message_from`) is a better fit than open-coded match.
+
+### Schema type usages (504 unique refs)
+All the following move from `agent_client_protocol::X` to `agent_client_protocol::schema::X`:
+`AgentCapabilities`, `AuthenticateRequest`, `AuthenticateResponse`, `AvailableCommand`, `AvailableCommandInput`, `CancelNotification`, `ClientCapabilities`, `ContentBlock`, `ContentChunk`, `CurrentModeUpdate`, `Error`/`ErrorCode`/`Result`, `ExtNotification`, `ExtRequest`, `ExtResponse`, `FileSystemCapabilities`, `Implementation`, `InitializeRequest`/`InitializeResponse`, `LoadSessionRequest`/`LoadSessionResponse`, `McpCapabilities`, `McpServer{Http,Sse,Stdio}`, `NewSessionRequest`/`NewSessionResponse`, `Plan`, `PlanEntry`, `PlanEntryPriority`, `PlanEntryStatus`, `PromptCapabilities`, `PromptRequest`/`PromptResponse`, `ProtocolVersion::{V0,V1}`, `RawValue::from_string`, `ReadTextFileRequest`, `SessionId`, `SessionMode`, `SessionModeId`, `SessionModeState`, `SessionNotification`, `SessionUpdate::{AgentMessageChunk, CurrentModeUpdate, Plan, ToolCall, ToolCallUpdate, UserMessageChunk}`, `SetSessionModeRequest`/`SetSessionModeResponse`, `StopReason::{Cancelled, EndTurn, MaxTokens, Refusal}`, `TextContent`, `ToolCall`, `ToolCallId`, `ToolCallStatus::Pending`, `ToolCallUpdate`, `ToolKind`, `WriteTextFileRequest`. (Note: `Error`, `ErrorCode`, `Result` and the role markers are still re-exported at the crate root — those don't need the path change.)

-Specific things to handle:
-1. `Agent` trait method signatures match 0.11; new required methods (if any) get implementations consistent with the existing AcpServer pattern.
-2. `match` arms in `translation.rs` over `SessionUpdate`, `ContentBlock`, `ContentChunk`, `ToolKind`, `ToolCallStatus` — add explicit handling for any new non_exhaustive variants.
-3. Error conversion in `error.rs` and `translation.rs::ToJsonRpcError` — adjust if `Error` constructors changed.
-4. `acp/config.rs` — verify any `ConfigOption` / capability types still match.
+### Tests
+- `llama-agent/tests/acp_integration.rs` and `llama-agent/tests/integration/acp_*.rs` drive `AcpServer` end-to-end. **Rewrite the test harness** alongside the production rewrite — these tests are the regression net for the AcpServer rebuild.

 ## Acceptance Criteria
 - [ ] `cargo check -p llama-agent --all-targets` passes.
 - [ ] `cargo clippy -p llama-agent --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes.
-- [ ] All `Agent` trait methods implemented; no missing-method errors.
+- [ ] No `Agent` trait impl remains; agent assembly uses the 0.11 builder/handler pattern.
+- [ ] `examples/acp_stdio.rs` runs and serves an end-to-end ACP exchange (covered explicitly by the workspace-green task).

 ## Tests
 - [ ] `cargo nextest run -p llama-agent` — all pass.
@@ -40,8 +48,12 @@
 - [ ] `llama-agent/tests/acp_integration.rs` and `tests/integration/acp_*.rs` — green.

 ## Workflow
-- Strict adaptation task — restore green, no feature additions.
+- Read the migration guide first: https://agentclientprotocol.github.io/rust-sdk/migration_v0.11.x.html
+- Read `examples/simple_agent.rs` in the 0.11.1 source for the canonical builder pattern.
+- This is a **rewrite**, not a refactor.
+- Sequence: lift the AcpServer body into a builder definition; preserve the existing translation logic in `translation.rs` but route it through the new dispatch primitives.

 ## Depends on
 - 01KQ367XFMW2CP7GWM4GJ41BNR (version bump).
-- 01KQ368MJDZNHXZ5HM9QQ0JGBK (extras crate adapted — llama-agent depends on it).
\ No newline at end of file
+- 01KQ368MJDZNHXZ5HM9QQ0JGBK (extras crate rewritten — llama-agent depends on its new wrapper API).
+- Spike findings: 01KQ367HE0Z8ZSXY90CTT8QYGG.

(Note: `Error`, `ErrorCode`, `Result` and the role markers are still re-exported at the crate root — those don't need the path change.)

changes.old_value:
## What

**REWRITE** `llama-agent/` against the new ACP 0.11.1 SDK design. The old `impl Agent` pattern is gone (see spike findings on task 01KQ367HE0Z8ZSXY90CTT8QYGG and migration guide https://agentclientprotocol.github.io/rust-sdk/migration_v0.11.x.html).

504 lines reference `agent_client_protocol`. Largest single hot-spot is `acp/server.rs` (the `AcpServer` `impl Agent`) and `acp/translation.rs` (heavy `match` over schema enums).

## Spike-confirmed scope

### The full Agent impl is gone
- `llama-agent/src/acp/server.rs` defines `AcpServer` with the old 9-method `impl Agent`. **Rewrite as a builder graph.**
- Supporting modules (`acp/session.rs`, `acp/translation.rs`, `acp/mcp_client_factory.rs`, `acp/permissions.rs`, `acp/commands.rs`, `acp/terminal.rs`, `acp/filesystem.rs`, `acp/plan.rs`, `acp/error.rs`, `acp/config.rs`, `acp/mod.rs`) all need import-path migration to `agent_client_protocol::schema::*` plus call-site adjustments where they construct/consume the old types.
- `llama-agent/src/mcp_client_handler.rs`, `llama-agent/src/mcp.rs` — same.
- `llama-agent/src/agent.rs` (top-level agent server) — same.
- `llama-agent/src/examples/acp_stdio.rs` — rewrite the stdio entrypoint to use the new `Agent.builder().connect_to(...)` pattern; the existing stdio harness is an `impl Agent` driver.

### Match-arm rewrites
- `acp/translation.rs` has heavy `match` over `SessionUpdate`, `ContentBlock`, `ContentChunk`, `ToolKind`, `ToolCallStatus`, `StopReason`. Each block needs:
  - Import-path migration to `schema::`
  - Continued explicit handling of `#[non_exhaustive]` variants
  - Possibly a structural rewrite if the new typed message dispatch (`MatchDispatchFrom`, `if_request_from`, `if_message_from`) is a better fit than open-coded match.

### Schema type usages (504 unique refs)
All the following move from `agent_client_protocol::X` to `agent_client_protocol::schema::X`:
`AgentCapabilities`, `AuthenticateRequest`, `AuthenticateResponse`, `AvailableCommand`, `AvailableCommandInput`, `CancelNotification`, `ClientCapabilities`, `ContentBlock`, `ContentChunk`, `CurrentModeUpdate`, `Error`/`ErrorCode`/`Result`, `ExtNotification`, `ExtRequest`, `ExtResponse`, `FileSystemCapabilities`, `Implementation`, `InitializeRequest`/`InitializeResponse`, `LoadSessionRequest`/`LoadSessionResponse`, `McpCapabilities`, `McpServer{Http,Sse,Stdio}`, `NewSessionRequest`/`NewSessionResponse`, `Plan`, `PlanEntry`, `PlanEntryPriority`, `PlanEntryStatus`, `PromptCapabilities`, `PromptRequest`/`PromptResponse`, `ProtocolVersion::{V0,V1}`, `RawValue::from_string`, `ReadTextFileRequest`, `SessionId`, `SessionMode`, `SessionModeId`, `SessionModeState`, `SessionNotification`, `SessionUpdate::{AgentMessageChunk, CurrentModeUpdate, Plan, ToolCall, ToolCallUpdate, UserMessageChunk}`, `SetSessionModeRequest`/`SetSessionModeResponse`, `StopReason::{Cancelled, EndTurn, MaxTokens, Refusal}`, `TextContent`, `ToolCall`, `ToolCallId`, `ToolCallStatus::Pending`, `ToolCallUpdate`, `ToolKind`, `WriteTextFileRequest`. (Note: `Error`, `ErrorCode`, `Result` and the role markers are still re-exported at the crate root — those don't need the path change.)

### Tests
- `llama-agent/tests/acp_integration.rs` and `llama-agent/tests/integration/acp_*.rs` drive `AcpServer` end-to-end. **Rewrite the test harness** alongside the production rewrite — these tests are the regression net for the AcpServer rebuild.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `cargo check -p llama-agent --all-targets` passes.
- [ ] `cargo clippy -p llama-agent --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes.
- [ ] No `Agent` trait impl remains; agent assembly uses the 0.11 builder/handler pattern.
- [ ] `examples/acp_stdio.rs` runs and serves an end-to-end ACP exchange (covered explicitly by the workspace-green task).

## Tests
- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p llama-agent` — all pass.
- [ ] `llama-agent/tests/acp_integration.rs` and `tests/integration/acp_*.rs` — green.

## Workflow
- Read the migration guide first: https://agentclientprotocol.github.io/rust-sdk/migration_v0.11.x.html
- Read `examples/simple_agent.rs` in the 0.11.1 source for the canonical builder pattern.
- This is a **rewrite**, not a refactor.
- Sequence: lift the AcpServer body into a builder definition; preserve the existing translation logic in `translation.rs` but route it through the new dispatch primitives.

## Depends on
- 01KQ367XFMW2CP7GWM4GJ41BNR (version bump).
- 01KQ368MJDZNHXZ5HM9QQ0JGBK (extras crate rewritten — llama-agent depends on its new wrapper API).
- Spike findings: 01KQ367HE0Z8ZSXY90CTT8QYGG.

-`AgentCapabilities`, `AuthenticateRequest`, `AuthenticateResponse`, `AvailableCommand`, `AvailableCommandInput`, `CancelNotification`, `ClientCapabilities`, `ContentBlock`, `ContentChunk`, `CurrentModeUpdate`, `Error`/`ErrorCode`/`Result`, `ExtNotification`, `ExtRequest`, `ExtResponse`, `FileSystemCapabilities`, `Implementation`, `InitializeRequest`/`InitializeResponse`, `LoadSessionRequest`/`LoadSessionResponse`, `McpCapabilities`, `McpServer{Http,Sse,Stdio}`, `NewSessionRequest`/`NewSessionResponse`, `Plan`, `PlanEntry`, `PlanEntryPriority`, `PlanEntryStatus`, `PromptCapabilities`, `PromptRequest`/`PromptResponse`, `ProtocolVersion::{V0,V1}`, `RawValue::from_string`, `ReadTextFileRequest`, `SessionId`, `SessionMode`, `SessionModeId`, `SessionModeState`, `SessionNotification`, `SessionUpdate::{AgentMessageChunk, CurrentModeUpdate, Plan, ToolCall, ToolCallUpdate, UserMessageChunk}`, `SetSessionModeRequest`/`SetSessionModeResponse`, `StopReason::{Cancelled, EndTurn, MaxTokens, Refusal}`, `TextContent`, `ToolCall`, `ToolCallId`, `ToolCallStatus::Pending`, `ToolCallUpdate`, `ToolKind`, `WriteTextFileRequest`. (Note: `Error`, `ErrorCode`, `Result` and the role markers are still re-exported at the crate root — those don't need the path change.)
-
-### Tests
-- `llama-agent/tests/acp_integration.rs` and `llama-agent/tests/integration/acp_*.rs` drive `AcpServer` end-to-end. **Rewrite the test harness** alongside the production rewrite — these tests are the regression net for the AcpServer rebuild.

+assignees:

+## What
+
+**REWRITE** `llama-agent/` against the new ACP 0.11.1 SDK design. The old `impl Agent` pattern is gone (see spike findings on task 01KQ367HE0Z8ZSXY90CTT8QYGG and migration guide https://agentclientprotocol.github.io/rust-sdk/migration_v0.11.x.html).
+
+504 lines reference `agent_client_protocol`. Largest single hot-spot is `acp/server.rs` (the `AcpServer` `impl Agent`) and `acp/translation.rs` (heavy `match` over schema enums).
+
+## Spike-confirmed scope
+
+### The full Agent impl is gone
+- `llama-agent/src/acp/server.rs` defines `AcpServer` with the old 9-method `impl Agent`. **Rewrite as a builder graph.**
+- Supporting modules (`acp/session.rs`, `acp/translation.rs`, `acp/mcp_client_factory.rs`, `acp/permissions.rs`, `acp/commands.rs`, `acp/terminal.rs`, `acp/filesystem.rs`, `acp/plan.rs`, `acp/error.rs`, `acp/config.rs`, `acp/mod.rs`) all need import-path migration to `agent_client_protocol::schema::*` plus call-site adjustments where they construct/consume the old types.
+- `llama-agent/src/mcp_client_handler.rs`, `llama-agent/src/mcp.rs` — same.
+- `llama-agent/src/agent.rs` (top-level agent server) — same.
+- `llama-agent/src/examples/acp_stdio.rs` — rewrite the stdio entrypoint to use the new `Agent.builder().connect_to(...)` pattern; the existing stdio harness is an `impl Agent` driver.
+
+### Match-arm rewrites
+- `acp/translation.rs` has heavy `match` over `SessionUpdate`, `ContentBlock`, `ContentChunk`, `ToolKind`, `ToolCallStatus`, `StopReason`. Each block needs:
+  - Import-path migration to `schema::`
+  - Continued explicit handling of `#[non_exhaustive]` variants
+  - Possibly a structural rewrite if the new typed message dispatch (`MatchDispatchFrom`, `if_request_from`, `if_message_from`) is a better fit than open-coded match.
+
+### Schema type usages (504 unique refs)
+All the following move from `agent_client_protocol::X` to `agent_client_protocol::schema::X`:
+`AgentCapabilities`, `AuthenticateRequest`, `AuthenticateResponse`, `AvailableCommand`, `AvailableCommandInput`, `CancelNotification`, `ClientCapabilities`, `ContentBlock`, `ContentChunk`, `CurrentModeUpdate`, `Error`/`ErrorCode`/`Result`, `ExtNotification`, `ExtRequest`, `ExtResponse`, `FileSystemCapabilities`, `Implementation`, `InitializeRequest`/`InitializeResponse`, `LoadSessionRequest`/`LoadSessionResponse`, `McpCapabilities`, `McpServer{Http,Sse,Stdio}`, `NewSessionRequest`/`NewSessionResponse`, `Plan`, `PlanEntry`, `PlanEntryPriority`, `PlanEntryStatus`, `PromptCapabilities`, `PromptRequest`/`PromptResponse`, `ProtocolVersion::{V0,V1}`, `RawValue::from_string`, `ReadTextFileRequest`, `SessionId`, `SessionMode`, `SessionModeId`, `SessionModeState`, `SessionNotification`, `SessionUpdate::{AgentMessageChunk, CurrentModeUpdate, Plan, ToolCall, ToolCallUpdate, UserMessageChunk}`, `SetSessionModeRequest`/`SetSessionModeResponse`, `StopReason::{Cancelled, EndTurn, MaxTokens, Refusal}`, `TextContent`, `ToolCall`, `ToolCallId`, `ToolCallStatus::Pending`, `ToolCallUpdate`, `ToolKind`, `WriteTextFileRequest`. (Note: `Error`, `ErrorCode`, `Result` and the role markers are still re-exported at the crate root — those don't need the path change.)
+
+### Tests
+- `llama-agent/tests/acp_integration.rs` and `llama-agent/tests/integration/acp_*.rs` drive `AcpServer` end-to-end. **Rewrite the test harness** alongside the production rewrite — these tests are the regression net for the AcpServer rebuild.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `cargo check -p llama-agent --all-targets` passes.
+- [ ] `cargo clippy -p llama-agent --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes.
+- [ ] No `Agent` trait impl remains; agent assembly uses the 0.11 builder/handler pattern.
+- [ ] `examples/acp_stdio.rs` runs and serves an end-to-end ACP exchange (covered explicitly by the workspace-green task).
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p llama-agent` — all pass.
+- [ ] `llama-agent/tests/acp_integration.rs` and `tests/integration/acp_*.rs` — green.
+
+## Workflow
+- Read the migration guide first: https://agentclientprotocol.github.io/rust-sdk/migration_v0.11.x.html
+- Read `examples/simple_agent.rs` in the 0.11.1 source for the canonical builder pattern.
+- This is a **rewrite**, not a refactor.
+- Sequence: lift the AcpServer body into a builder definition; preserve the existing translation logic in `translation.rs` but route it through the new dispatch primitives.
